text: someone brought in a cake for gary but gary quit last week lmao
the guy in the quiet car is having a full phone argument about his divorce
i have 47 tupperware lids and zero matching containers
brought an umbrella today. not a cloud in the sky. ur welcome everyone
forgot to mail the rebate again its been 8 months the receipt is in my jeans
used half a lint roller on one sweater today. the cat doesnt even feel bad
did napkin math on my finances and apparently i owe money to the napkin
the slow walker in front of me is moving at continental drift speed
parallel universe me definitely remembered to cancel that free trial
microphone feedback at the all-hands made karen's presentation actually better
we sang happy birthday to someone none of us have ever seen before
quiet car lady is clipping her nails and i can hear every single one
opened the tupperware cabinet and three lids fell on my head
bought a new umbrella. lost it on the bus within 40 mins. personal record
the rebate form wants a upc code i already threw in the trash 3 months ago
lint roller ran out mid-jacket. walked around looking half professional half cat lady
napkin math says i can retire at 97 if i stop eating lunch
three people walking shoulder to shoulder on the sidewalk. no gap. send help
parallel universe me has a savings account and a clean desk
the mic screeched so loud during standup that dave spilled his coffee
nobody told me its my own birthday cake day. found out from the calendar invite
dude in quiet car is watching tiktoks on full volume with no shame
i keep buying tupperware like the old ones will magically reappear
forecast said rain so i brought 2 umbrellas. it snowed
found the rebate form. it expired yesterday. i am cursed
my coworker saw my lint roller collection and asked if i was ok
did the math on a napkin at brunch. forgot to carry the 1. now i think im rich
the slow walker stopped. just stopped. in the middle of the stairs
parallel universe me is definitely not eating cereal for dinner again
presenter tapped the mic 6 times before realizing it was already on
HR bought a sheet cake that says 'happy birthday employees' plural
someone is facetiming in the quiet car and showing the caller the scenery
found tupperware in the back of the fridge from a civilization that no longer exists
left my umbrella at home on purpose today. got absolutely destroyed by rain
mailed the rebate. wrong address. i literally cannot win
travel lint roller in my bag, desk lint roller at work, emergency one in the car
napkin math told me i could afford the trip. credit card disagrees
slow walker merged into my lane and then slowed down even more. unreal
parallel universe me wakes up at 5am and journals. disgusting
the zoom mic picked up someone flushing a toilet during the ceo's speech
they put my name wrong on the birthday cake. been here 4 years
i shushed someone in the quiet car and they shushed me back louder
my tupperware drawer is just a pile of plastic trauma at this point
umbrella broke inside out on the walk to work. looked like a cartoon character
the rebate was $4. ive spent $7 in stamps trying to mail it
lint rollered my date outfit so hard i took off the top layer of fabric
according to my napkin math we can split this bill 5 ways for $47 each. there are 4 of us
slow walker on the escalator standing on the left side. blocked. trapped. done
parallel universe me has read all those books on the nightstand
hot mic caught me saying 'this meeting could have been an email' to the whole team
forced to eat cake at 9am because brenda from accounting is turning 50
quiet car conductor announced quiet car rules and the loud guy just laughed
brought lunch in a yogurt container because all my tupperware is at work
i own 11 umbrellas. cant find a single one when it rains
finally mailed the rebate. they need the original receipt. i sent a photo. rejected
used a lint roller on my office chair. it was... revealing
napkin math at the bar says we can afford one more round. narrator: they could not
the slow walker has airpods in. they cant hear my sighing. devastating
in a parallel universe i meal prep on sundays. this universe i eat crackers
bluetooth mic connected to the wrong laptop during my presentation. played my spotify
they reused last months birthday banner and crossed out the old name in sharpie
baby crying in the quiet car. cant even be mad. we've all been there
the work fridge is 60% abandoned tupperware and 40% passive aggressive notes
carried umbrella for 6 straight days of sunshine. left it home on day 7. rained
rebate check arrived. $2.50. after 4 months. i dont know what i expected
my black pants are basically a lint roller subscription service at this point
napkin math on my grocery bill. either eggs cost $900 or i cant add
two slow walkers met and stopped to chat. in a doorway. blocking everything
parallel universe me has a clean inbox. zero unread. cant even imagine
someone unmuted to sneeze during the earnings call. then forgot to remute
we all signed a card for someone named 'josh or possibly john'
the quiet car sign is right there. RIGHT THERE. he doesnt care
opened old tupperware and something inside it had evolved. closed it. threw it away. container and all
bought a clear umbrella so i can watch the sky betray me in real time
the rebate website crashed. twice. while i was filling out the form. on the last step
lint roller sheets running low. this is my version of a gas light going on
did napkin math on how much napkin math has cost me. dont wanna talk about it
slow walker stopped to take a photo of a building. we are in a crosswalk. the light is changing
parallel universe me flossed every night. this universe me bought floss once in 2019
the fire alarm mic is louder than any human should have to endure at 8am
office birthday cake was from the gas station. the frosting tasted like ambition
quiet car violator is now eating chips. the crunchy kind. loudly
my tupperware collection has its own ecosystem at this point
lent someone my umbrella. never saw it or them again. classic
printed the rebate form at work. used all the cyan ink. got a talking to
found a lint roller in my winter coat pocket. felt like finding $20
my napkin math said the tip should be $11. the real answer was $7. sorry waiter
slow walker with a rolling suitcase. taking up the entire sidewalk. im gonna scream
parallel universe me has a 401k. this universe me has a collection of takeout menus
karaoke mic still on in the break room. could hear dave butcher bohemian rhapsody from my desk
mandatory fun birthday party during lunch. my actual lunch is getting cold
moved to a different car to escape the noise. its louder here somehow
roommate asked why we have 30 containers and zero lids. i have no defense
the umbrella broke but i kept holding it up out of spite
been carrying this rebate envelope in my bag for 3 weeks. just vibing
lint rolled my cat once. she liked it. now she demands it daily
tried napkin math to figure out if i should refinance. napkin caught fire. omen
slow walker ahead of me is texting with BOTH hands. zero awareness. incredible
in a parallel universe my plants are alive and my laundry is folded
presentation mic died mid sentence. just stood there in silence for 10 seconds
